evidence.title: Compensation Policy
evidence.content: Low-risk compensation can be auto-approved up to 50 USD for platinum and gold customers when policy conditions are met.

evidence.title: Baggage Recovery SOP
evidence.content: Delayed baggage cases require bag-trace creation, airport ops routing, customer updates every 12 hours, and reimbursement review for essentials.

evidence.title: Escalation Policy
evidence.content: High-risk, fraud-sensitive, or compensation requests above 50 USD require manual approval before execution.

evidence.title: Payment gateway reconciliation delay
evidence.content: Refund delayed by gateway reconciliation was routed to payments ops with customer notification. Outcome: successful after verification.
